title: pouteria punctata
intro: Pouteria punctata, also known as the Punctata Sapote or Yellow Sapote, is a species of evergreen tree native to Mexico and Central America. The tree is valued for its edible fruit, which has medicinal properties and is used to treat various health conditions. The fruit is rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, providing several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Pouteria punctata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and extracts, which are often used to alleviate digestive issues and boost the immune system.
